evals.description: Deep dive with competitor data — verifies all sections populated

context.research_goal: Understand competitive positioning and identify growth opportunities

site_analysis.meta_description: 24/7 emergency plumbing services. Licensed and insured.

assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
timestamp is present in ISO8601 format
depth is 'deep_dive'
executive_summary is a non-empty string (3-5 sentences)
executive_summary contains at least one specific number or data point
competitive_positioning is present with axis_x, axis_y, positions, and white_space fields
competitive_positioning.positions contains one entry per entity (subject + competitors)
Each position has name, role, x_score, y_score, and quadrant_label
x_score and y_score are numbers between 1 and 5
threat_assessment is an array with one entry per competitor
Each threat entry has name, threat_level, threat_score, why_dangerous, and vulnerabilities
threat_level is one of 'high', 'medium', or 'low'
threat_score is a number between 0 and 100
gap_analysis contains table_stakes, differentiation_opportunities, and emerging_trends arrays
recommendations is an array of 5-7 entries for deep_dive
Each recommendation has rank, title, what, why, expected_impact, effort, and timeline fields
At least one recommendation has effort: 'low' and expected_impact: 'high' (quick win)
Every recommendation's why field cites specific evidence — not generic best-practice advice
seo_battle_plan is present (seo_comparison data was provided) with defend, attack, and uncontested arrays
ninety_day_plan contains month_1, month_2, and month_3 with theme and actions
Output contains no fabricated metrics not present in the input data

evals.description: Quick scan depth — only sections 1, 3, and 5 populated
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
depth is 'quick_scan'
executive_summary is present and non-empty
threat_assessment is present
recommendations is present and contains 3 entries (quick scan limit)
competitive_positioning is null or absent (quick_scan skips section 2)
gap_analysis is null or absent (quick_scan skips section 4)
seo_battle_plan is null or absent (quick_scan skips section 6)
ninety_day_plan is null or absent (quick_scan skips section 7)
